//: Copy this to a project's root as `.orbit.json` to tell Orbit how to
//2: read that project's coordination state. EVERY field is optional — omit anything
//3: and Orbit uses its built-in defaults (shown below). Orbit only READS these
//4: files; it never writes them, so a format change can at worst blank the COORD panel.
//commands: Quick buttons in the command bar; each opens a shell session running `run`.
//docs: Exact always-on docs for the pinned-docs strip (overrides the default set).
//accent: Hex color to color-code this project across its tabs/UI.
//subprojects: Monorepo members shown nested under this project (each a full project). Auto-detected from a *.code-workspace if omitted.
